summary: On 2022-03-14, there were 17 adverse event reports for lisinopril, which is lower than the expected 39.84 based on a Holt-Winters forecast, indicating a statistically anomalous drop in reports.
notable_pattern: No clear pattern beyond the aggregate stats, but most reports were received on 2022-03-11, within the +/-3 day window.
confidence_caveat: This is an exploratory signal from a limited sample of 8 reports, not a clinical conclusion.
